releases.title: Fully Grounded with hundreds of  data sources
releases.lead: Every step in every journey now carries an authoritative source, and high-friction steps are annotated with real-world gotchas.

changes.title: Source citations, everywhere.
changes.body: Each of the 57 permit / license / certification types links out to its official reference — IRS for an EIN, FDA for food registration, the International Code Council for a building permit.

changes.title: Gotchas on high-friction steps.
changes.body: 454 annotated gotchas flag the places where applicants commonly stall, get rejected, or hit a surprise requirement. A red dot on a step means it has one.

changes.title: Journey sources panel.
changes.body: A collapsible panel under each journey lists the broader references grouped into regulatory, industry guides, and datasets.

changes.title: Methodology redesign.
changes.body: This page was rebuilt as a dossier on the underlying dataset — live counters, the dependency-edge taxonomy, sample gotchas, the three-layer citation architecture, and the most-cited source domains.

releases.title: Dependency-aware journeys
releases.lead: Journey steps now sequence themselves by real-world prerequisites. Zoning approval comes before a building permit because it has to.

changes.title: Smarter step ordering.
changes.body: Each step sits after everything it depends on. Within any level, shorter steps come first so the longest remaining hurdle is the visible next milestone.

changes.title: Dependency View.
changes.body: A toggle replaces the matrix with an animated flow of how steps connect. Ambient loops through the journey as a guided tour; Realistic plays once at one day ≈ 0.1 seconds and surfaces the minimum total time if independent steps run in parallel.

changes.title: 167 new dependency edges,
changes.body: each typed as hard (blocks the next step), soft (conventional but not required), or parallel (can happen concurrently).

changes.title: Mobile-ready.
changes.body: The journey page works on phones with a phase-by-phase accordion and compact timeline.

releases.title: Launch
releases.lead: The Permit & License Journey Explorer goes public — 114 real-world journeys across 15 categories, mapped across federal, state, and local requirements.

changes.title: 114 journeys,
changes.body: from opening a restaurant to becoming a nurse to hosting a street festival.

changes.title: Jurisdictional matrix view.
changes.body: Each journey renders as a four-phase by three-jurisdiction grid so you can see which permits come from which level of government at a glance.

changes.title: Search and filter.
changes.body: Find a journey by name, or narrow the list by jurisdiction and category.

changes.title: Step details.
changes.body: Tap any step to see its agency, application fee, processing time, renewal cycle, and downstream impact.
